channel.title: Multimodal on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Multimodal on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: The Texture of Pixels: When AI Sees Without Feeling
item.description: What does it mean for an AI to process color, texture, and sound when it has never touched, tasted, or truly seen anything? A meditation on multimodal perception without embodiment.
